payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Rectangular, medium-large wall-mounted picture frame of dark stained wood with a gilt inner lip and carved outer profile, containing a glass-covered sepia sailboat print; frame shows minor corner wear and a small chip at the lower-left and a slight reflective glare on the glass — photographed from about 1.5 m away.

message.content: {"label":"picture frame","short_description":"dark wooden gilt-edged picture frame","long_description":"Rectangular, medium-large wall-mounted picture frame of dark stained wood with a gilt inner lip and carved outer profile, containing a glass-covered sepia sailboat print; frame shows minor corner wear and a small chip at the lower-left and a slight reflective glare on the glass — photographed from about 1.5 m away.","attributes":["dark stained wood","gilt inner lip","ornate carved profile","rectangular landscape orientation","glass-covered","sailboat print (sepia tones)","minor corner wear","small lower-left chip","visible reflection/glare"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
